ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Sep-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Continued To Sep-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that there have been previous coninuances at the reqeust of the Attorney, that there is no request to continue today's hearing and that the 18-month period to close the Estate has passed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on September 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they falied to appear and why they failed to file a Petition for Final Distribution. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Continued To Jul-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Continued To Jun-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Pelavin for and with Maureen Myo Aung.

Status of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to June 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Family members to pay down Estate debts.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguer/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Continued To Feb-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on February 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed, why sanctions of the amount of $25.00 per day should not be imposed and to address the possibility of termination of the Estate.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
